title: borreria scandens
intro: Borreria scandens, also known as Climbing Borreria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a climbing shrub native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Borreria scandens include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health.
intro_study: According to "Pharmaceutical biology", Borreria scandens benefits are due to its extracts, particularly the ethyl acetate and methanol extracts, which have been shown to exhibit natural antioxidant, antihyperuricemic, and anti-inflammatory activities, making them potential alternatives for use in dietary supplements.
